questionHtml:
Which chemical process would produce a voltaic cell?


A.  spontaneous redox reaction

B.  spontaneous non-redox reaction

C.  non-spontaneous redox reaction

D.  non-spontaneous non-redox reaction

meta.title: Which chemical process would produce a voltaic cell? A. spontaneous redox reaction B. spontaneous non-redox reaction C. non-spontaneous redox reaction D. non-spontaneous non-redox
